_note: HLA population coverage of EWSR1::NR4A3 junction neoepitopes. Allele frequencies are sample-size-weighted global means scraped from the Allele Frequency Net Database (AFND; Gonzalez-Galarza 2020). Coverage = fraction of individuals carrying >=1 presenting allele = 1 - prod(1-af)^2. Global means hide large between-population variation; confirm per target population.
